v0.8.5

// ABOUT

Phil Vishnevsky

I write code, break things, and occasionally ship something useful.

locationHartford, CT
focusSWE · AI · Games
statusOpen to opportunities

// EXPERIENCE

The story so far

Started coding in 2019. Haven't really stopped. That's, like, 2,484 days of experience. Or 214,674,074 seconds
